productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - Peanut Butter Fudge - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Peanut Butter, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of coffee, butter, and nutty, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
